headline: Trian Calls on Solventum's Board to Create Value; Publishes Open Letter and Slide Deck
summary: Solventum's Spin-Out from 3M has Maximized Executive Compensation, Not Shareholder Value Outlines Three Initiatives to Improve Performance and Drive Value Creation at Solventum NEW YORK, April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Trian Fund Management, L.P. headline: Solventum Shareholders Trian Fund Management Send Open Letter To Board, Calling On Company To Cut Overhead Costs, Divest Non-Core Businesses, And Prioritize Share Buybacks
summary: Trian believes Solventum would be a considerably more valuable company today if the Board and management are willing to take steps to realize its potential, including:Right-sizing overhead costs, driving net productivity

headline: CVS Q1 Earnings Preview: Health Services Likely to Lead Performance
summary: CVS Health heads into Q1 earnings results with Health Services growth expected to offset pressure in benefits, as revenues dip slightly and costs remain elevated.

headline: Labcorp Holdings (LH) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
summary: Labcorp (LH) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +3.81% and +1.03%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
